steps.title: Identify the possessive number
steps.content: The blank must show that the writings belong to Thomas Paine, one author, requiring a singular possessive form.

steps.title: Apply the possessive rule
steps.content:
A singular noun uses apostrophe-s for its possessive: “author's” for one author.

Since Paine created multiple works, the noun must be plural: “writings”.

The other choices either lack possessive apostrophes, create double possessives, or use the wrong number.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
